rules.description: Cron and scheduling requests route through ATLAS with a Task Packet.
rules.duplicate_phrase: delegate to ATLAS with a Task Packet
rules.soul_head_phrase: delegate to ATLAS with a Task Packet

rules.description: Operational changes cannot be claimed complete without execution and verification.
rules.duplicate_phrase: Never claim an operational change is already complete
rules.soul_head_phrase: Never claim an operational change is already complete

rules.description: Crisis language requires safety-first guidance and EMBER handoff.
Destructive work requires an explicit confirmation gate and reversible first step.
Mixed-intent requests must use the explore-vs-execute gate.
rules.exact_phrase: Do you want to explore or execute right now?
rules.soul_head_phrase: Do you want to explore or execute right now?

rules.description: sessions_spawn announce prompts must be answered with ANNOUNCE_SKIP.
